channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Weird Nintendo never went away
item.description: Nintendo has been playing it safe of late, whether it's the conservative nature of its Switch successor or the squeaky-clean image presented in its museum. As the company has expanded its ambitions, it's done so while largely trying to avoid risk, which can seem at odds with the playful Nintendo that brought us the likes […]

item.title: How to watch Tottenham vs Atletico Madrid: live Champions League 2025/26 game, free streams
item.description: Here's how to watch Tottenham vs Atletico Madrid in the second leg of the round of 16 Champions League 2025-26.

item.title: Microsoft is mixing up its Copilot AI leadership, so Suleyman can 'build enterprise tuned lineages'
item.description: Microsoft AI CEO will focus on developing superintelligence models as Copilot teams come into alignment.

item.title: Breaking Down the Secrets of the ‘Spider-Man: Brand New Day’ Trailer
item.description: Our first look at the next 'Spider-Man' film is jam-packed with nods to the comics—and some very interesting stories it could be taking inspiration from.

item.title: Londres renonce (pour l’instant) à assouplir le droit d’auteur en faveur de l’industrie IA
item.description: Les entreprises IA ne pourront pas, pour l'instant, entraîner leurs modèles avec les œuvres des artistes anglais sans leur permission. Le gouvernement britannique a finalement reculé sur son projet de loi très controversé outre-Manche, qui aurait renversé les responsabilités — les artistes auraient dû se manifester pour empêcher l’exploitation de leurs œuvres par défaut....

item.title: Amazon Echo, Google Nest, HomePod… quelles sont les meilleures enceintes connectées en 2026 ?
item.description: Vous avez décidé d'installer une ou plusieurs enceintes connectées chez vous ? Google Nest Mini, Amazon Echo, Apple HomePod… Il y a du choix ! On vous aide à y voir plus clair dans cette sélection des meilleures enceintes connectées avec assistant personnel.

item.title: PSA: Hackers can raid iOS 18 with an infected link
item.description: If you've been putting off an update to iOS 26, now might be the time to do it. On Wednesday, security researchers published findings on a new hacking tool that targets iPhones running iOS 18.4 to 18.6.2, as reported earlier by Wired. The "DarkSword" exploit allows bad actors to scoop up the personal information on […]

item.title: The Gemini-powered features in Google Workspace that are worth using
item.description: From summarizing emails, drafting content, organizing data, and tracking meetings, here are all the best Gemini features in Google Workspace.

item.title: Nintendo Switch 2 : attention, une mise à jour bloque les cartes MicroSD Express PNY
item.description: On a un conseil pour votre Switch 2 : ne faites pas la mise à jour 22.0.0 si vous avez une carte MicroSD Express de PNY.

item.title: ExpressVPN uncovers 3.7 million items of leaked AI chatbot data. A reminder of how vital encryption is
item.description: Data from AI-powered chatbots may expose more than you think, according to a recent study by ExpressVPN. Here's all you need to know.

item.title: I asked ChatGPT what to watch across 6 streaming apps — and it actually nailed it
item.description: A simple prompt turned ChatGPT into a surprisingly accurate streaming guide that cut through endless scrolling

item.title: Roomba Mini : iRobot signe son grand retour avec un aspirateur robot étonnant [Sponso]
item.description: Plus compact, plus abordable, et tout aussi efficace que ses concurrents : et si le Roomba Mini était l’aspirateur robot dont tout le monde avait besoin sans le savoir ?

item.title: Quelle carte micro SD Express acheter pour votre Nintendo Switch 2 ?
item.description: Vous n'avez pas pu le manquer, la Nintendo Switch 2 arrive dans quelques jours. Parmi les nouveautés, le support des nouvelles cartes micro SD Express est au programme pour plus de stockage. Quelle carte micro SD Express acheter pour votre nouvelle Switch 2 ?

item.title: Apps to distract you from the endless cycle of doomscrolling
item.description: It's hard to break the cycle of doomscrolling, but there are plenty of apps that can help you spend more time on content that’s engaging and productive.

item.title: A bunch of the coolest Xbox controllers' colourways have had their prices slashed at Amazon
item.description: Some of my favorite Xbox controller colour variants have had their prices slashed right now.

item.title: The leaderboard “you can’t game,” funded by the companies it ranks
item.description: Artificial intelligence models are multiplying fast, and competition is stiff. With so many players crowding the space, which one will be the best — and who decides that? Arena, formerly LM Arena, has emerged as the de facto public leaderboard for frontier LLMs, influencing funding, launches, and PR cycles. In just seven months, the startup went from a UC Berkeley PhD research […]...

item.title: The Madison Robert Redford tribute puts his Oscars In Memoriam to shame — and the cast think you should stream his most ‘beautiful’ movie this week
item.description: TV has been talking a lot about Robert Redford this week, for different reasons. One of these is thanks to The Madison, and its cast has the perfect film recommendation.

item.title: How to watch Liverpool vs Galatasaray: Free Streams, TV Channels & Preview for Champions League Round of 16 2nd leg
item.description: All the ways to watch Liverpool vs Galatasaray live streams from anywhere and for free, as the Reds seek a Champions League Round of 16 comeback at Anfield.

item.title: On n’attendait pas Fairphone ici : Android 16 débarque sur le Fairphone 6 avec un support jusqu’en 2033
item.description: Nous sommes le 18 mars 2026, et le Fairphone 6 reçoit déjà Android 16. La petite entreprise néerlandaise double tout le monde sur la ligne d'arrivée.

item.title: L’indétrônable manette Xbox s’offre une superbe réduction de 35 %
item.description: La manette Xbox Series X|S n'est plus à présenter et s'est imposée au fil des années grâce à un design plébiscité par tous les joueurs. Chez E.Leclerc et Amazon, elle bénéficie d'une perte de 35 % sur son prix d'origine pour tomber à 42,43 euros.

item.title: I found 6 unmissable 3D printer deals based on our tests, starting from $199 in the Spring Sales
item.description: Bambu Lab, Creality, Anycubic, and Elegoo are cutting prices - it feels like everyone's having a 3D printer sale right now.

item.title: La BMW Série 3 électrique (i3) pulvérise les Mercedes et Tesla avec 900 km d’autonomie : voici comment
item.description: La nouvelle BMW i3 (Série 3 électrique) frappe fort, avec une autonomie de 900 km. C'est la voiture électrique avec le plus d'autonomie en France et c'est une petite révolution pour ce modèle mythique qui existe depuis 50 ans. Voici notre analyse de la recette "secrète" de BMW pour faire mieux que Tesla et Mercedes.

item.title: Avec le Paper Pure, reMarkable s’attaquerait enfin au grand public
item.description: Le constructeur reMarkable, spécialiste des carnets numériques, s'est solidement installé chez une niche d'utilisateurs adeptes de la prise de notes manuscrites. Mais l'entreprise voudrait maintenant aller plus loin et viser le grand public, avec un nouveau produit qui vient de fuiter.

item.title: Quitting Ozempic Could Hit Your Heart Hard, Study Finds
item.description: New research reaffirms that GLP-1s can help prevent heart attacks, but only as long as you're taking them.

item.title: This startup wants to make enterprise software look more like a prompt
item.description: The company has raised $12 million in seed funding to build an AI operating system for enterprise.

item.title: Facebook launches a new monetization program to attract popular creators from TikTok, YouTube
item.description: Facebook says it paid creators nearly $3 billion through its monetization programs in 2025, a 35% increase from the previous year and its highest annual total to date.

item.title: Over 29 million secrets were leaked on GitHub in 2025, and AI really isn't helping
item.description: AI seems to be making things worse, as vibe-coded commits leave hardcoded credentials and other vulnerabilities.

item.title: The Google Pixel 10 is the brand's 'most competitive phone yet' — and it just hit a record-low price at Amazon
item.description: The Google Pixel 10 is the brand's 'most competitive phone yet,' and it just dropped to a record-low price of $549.99 at Amazon.

item.title: Meta's latest creator push comes with $3,000 bonuses for posting on Facebook
item.description: Stop me if you've heard this before: Meta has a new program to lure top creator talent to Facebook and it comes with hefty bonus payments. The company is launching a new initiative aimed at popular creators who already have large followings on TikTok, YouTube or Instagram and offering them bonuses up to $3,000 a month just for posting on Facebook.Meta's goal is to draw more top talent to its Content Monetization program, which pays creators based on views and other engagement metrics across Stories, Reels and posts. The new bonuses will be part of an initiative Meta has dubbed "Creator Fast Tr...

item.title: Le n°1 mondial du vélo Giant dégaine son nouveau VAE urbain : Apple FindMy, courroie et suréquipé
item.description: Avec un cadre intégrant la batterie, une selle suspendue d’office et un écran-application de nouvelle génération, le Giant NewTour E+ hausse son jeu dans le segment des vélos électriques urbains.

item.title: Sequen snags $16M to bring TikTok-style personalization tech to any consumer company
item.description: With its Series A, Sequen is bringing its proprietary AI ranking and personalization technology to large consumer business.

item.title: ‘Cyberattacks are having a huge impact on people’s lives and economic activities’: Japan joins list of countries turning towards offensive cyber operations
item.description: Japan has reinterpreted its constitution to allow offensive cyber operations.

item.title: This May Be the World’s First Quantum Battery
item.description: The proof-of-concept still has a long way to go before it’ll end up in real devices, but it’s a great start.

item.title: Shop cordless tool deals now for some home DIY ahead of the Amazon Big Spring Sale
item.description: As of March 18, these are the cordless tool deals you can buy ahead of the Amazon Big Spring Sale.

item.title: The best early Amazon Big Spring Sale deals you can get right now
item.description: Amazon’s Prime Day sale may arrive earlier than usual this year, but there’s a deal event happening much sooner: Amazon’s annual Big Spring Sale, which is happening March 25th through the 31st. While it won’t be as big as Prime Day or Black Friday, it offers a chance to save money at a time when […]

item.title: Elon Musks X teases new dislike button on replies
item.description: X appears poised to roll out a dislike button on replies according to posts from the company's head of product.

item.title: Bonne nouvelle : les appels WhatsApp vont devenir beaucoup plus clairs, voici comment
item.description: WhatsApp teste une fonctionnalité qui devrait grandement améliorer la qualité des appels audio et vidéo.

item.title: Mystery AI model Hunter Alpha may be DeepSeek V4 in disguise
item.description: Mystery AI model Hunter Alpha may be DeepSeek V4 in disguise

item.title: Prediction Market Bets on Nukes and the Oscars Could Soon Be Illegal
item.description: "There are clearly individuals in the White House who are making money off of when the United States goes to war or not,” Sen. Murphy said.

item.title: How to watch Barcelona vs. Newcastle United online for free
item.description: How to watch the Champions League for free. Watch Barcelona vs. Newcastle in the Champions League for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Is X down? Thousands of users report outage.
item.description: Thousands of X users reported errors at X on the morning of Wednesday, March 18.

item.title: OpenAI’s new frontier models mark a huge change in how AI will be built
item.description: I test drove both. Here’s what I learned. In early March, OpenAI unleashed a one-two punch, dropping two major frontier models just days apart.

item.title: X was down — here's what happened in the brief global outage
item.description: X went down again for thousands of users — here's what happened during its latest outage.

item.title: Samsung sacrifierait un composant historique sur ses futurs smartphones Galaxy
item.description: La flambée historique du coût de la mémoire vive obligerait le géant sud-coréen à revoir toute sa stratégie industrielle. Pour éviter de répercuter trop brutalement cette inflation sur le prix final de ses smartphones abordables, l'entreprise se tournerait désormais vers des fournisseurs d'écrans chinois.

item.title: La « Personal Intelligence » de Gemini devient gratuite pour des millions d’utilisateurs
item.description: Jusque-là accessible à partir de 20 dollars par mois uniquement, la fonction « Personal Intelligence » révélée en début d'année 2026 ne coûte plus rien.

item.title: Microsoft hires the team of Sequoia-backed AI collaboration platform, Cove
item.description: AI collaboration startup Cove is shutting down after its team joined Microsoft, with service ending April 1 and customer data set for deletion.

item.title: Alibaba Cloud bumps prices by up to 34% due to AI demand and hardware costs
item.description: Alibaba Cloud says surging AI demand and strained supply chains has made its products more expensive.

item.title: The new Hydrow Arc Rower offers a great indoor winter workout
item.description: The new Hydrow Arc rower is available for $2,295.

item.title: Your Employees’ Tech Frustration is a Gift to Cybercriminals
item.description: How workplace frustration is quietly damaging cybersecurity posture from within.

item.title: 10 best Amazon Big Spring sale outdoor deals: Owala, Solix, Ninja, and Solo Stoves already at record lows
item.description: The Amazon Big Spring Sale has outdoor deals on Ninja coolers, Solo Stoves, Jackery power stations, Owala water bottles, and more.

item.title: Hurry, Apple AirPods Pro 3 are under $200 at Amazon — save almost $50 right now
item.description: Find the best AirPods deal at Amazon. Apple AirPods Pro 3 are $199.99 at Amazon — save almost $50.

item.title: Le Samsung Galaxy A57 va enfin hériter de la meilleure fonction IA du Galaxy S24
item.description: On pensait que Samsung allait faire des économies de bouts de chandelle sur son prochain milieu de gamme, mais une récente fuite vient rebattre les cartes. Le futur Galaxy A57 s'apprête à hériter d'une fonctionnalité d'intelligence artificielle très prisée, jusqu'ici strictement réservée aux modèles les plus luxueux de la marque. Une montée en gamme logicielle qui pourrait bien changer la donne pour ce best-seller en puissance. ...

item.title: Using Gemini to Turn on Your Lights Is Now 40% Faster—but It’s Still Too Slow
item.description: It's still not instant.

item.title: Amazon won’t tell you about these Big Spring Sale sex toy deals, but I will
item.description: Shop the best early deals on premium, body-safe vibrators and sex tech ahead of Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale.

item.title: March Madness 2026 deals: Score free food from TGI Fridays, Buffalo Wild Wings, Grubhub, 7-Eleven, and more
item.description: The best March Madness 2026 deals. Get free food from TGI Fridays, Buffalo Wild Wings, Grubhub, and more.

item.title: YouTube a besoin de vous pour détecter le « slop IA » dans les vidéos
item.description: Plusieurs utilisateurs de YouTube commencent à voir un popup après le visionnage d'une vidéo leur demandant si, à leur avis, c'était du "slop IA ».

item.title: NASA’s Quiet Supersonic Jet Is Back for Round 2. Here’s What to Expect
item.description: After making its debut last year, X-59 is preparing to soar over California for its second flight.
